settings.text: Rub a coin-size amount between your palms to activate the guaraná complex.
60 seconds of firm upward circles drive the actives into the deep layer.
Used daily, skin looks visibly firmer and more lifted in 6–12 weeks.
We Don’t Fake The Amazon. We Source It.

Most “exotic” creams are cooked in a lab and dressed in a tropical label. Not ours. Our guaraná, cupuaçu and açaí are real Amazonian actives, wild-harvested at the source, then blended in FDA-compliant American facilities. The untamed power of the Amazon, with the safety of made-in-USA. No fillers. No fakes.
